title: Antigravity 3.0 (New Upgrades): Gemini 3.6, Agent Team-Up Option, Workbench, Low Thinking Effort
summary: Google released Antigravity 3.0 with slash teamwork for parallel multi-agent orchestration available on all paid plans, a new Science Skills bundle integrating research tools like AlphaFold and PubMed, improved Gemini 3.5 Flash models including a low-cost variant, and CLI session syncing for cross-platform continuity.
